code: import axiosClient from'./axiosClient';import{API_ENDPOINTS}from'../constants/apiEndpoints';export const authApi={login:async payload=>{const response=await axiosClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.AUTH.LOGIN,payload);return response.data;},register:async payload=>{const response=await axiosClient.post(API_ENDPOINTS.AUTH.REGISTER,payload);return response.data;}};
